description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs embody these very ideals. Its stylish waistband and blended composition give you a body enhancing fit.       Product DetailsWhite and black striped, seamless boxer-briefs, elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, maximum coverage, horizontal rib   in front for fit,   tag less abrasion-free comfort, a hint of stretch in fabric provides extra supportMaterial and Care80% cotton, 15%polyamide   and 5% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular RiseThe model (height 6' waist 32'') is wearing a size M
